title: Started omeprazole 40 mg daily
description: Omeprazole 40 mg once daily was initiated at the prior clinic visit.

title: Prior clinic visit with omeprazole initiation
description: At a previous clinic visit, the patient was started on omeprazole 40 mg daily.

title: Gastroenterology clinic visit
description: Patient was previously seen in clinic for abdominal and reflux-related symptoms.

title: Follow-up gastroenterology visit
description: Patient seen for follow-up of abdominal pain, bloating, and intermittent dysphagia.

title: Diagnosed GERD with partial PPI response
description: Assessment included gastroesophageal reflux disease with only partial response to proton pump inhibitor therapy.

title: Omeprazole dose increased
description: Plan was to increase omeprazole to 40 mg twice daily for 8 weeks.

title: Continue anti-reflux diet
description: Patient was advised to continue anti-reflux diet measures and avoid late evening meals.

title: Avoid late evening meals
description: Patient was advised to avoid late evening meals.

title: Advised to avoid trigger foods
description: Patient instructions included avoiding trigger foods.

title: Partial improvement with PPI therapy
description: Patient reported only partial symptom improvement with proton pump inhibitor treatment, with breakthrough symptoms several times per week.

title: Intermittent dysphagia persists
description: Patient described intermittent sensation of food sticking in the lower chest, ongoing for several months.

title: Postprandial bloating ongoing
description: Patient reported bloating after meals continuing for several months.

title: Postprandial bloating persists
description: Patient reported bloating after meals, ongoing for several months.

title: Ongoing upper abdominal discomfort
description: Patient reported persistent upper abdominal discomfort that has been present for several months.
